title: Coinbase Beats Q2 2024 Revenue Expectations Analysis
text: Coinbase's second-quarter 2024 revenue beat Wall Street analysts' estimates with total revenue of $1.45 billion versus average estimate of about $1.4 billion. Shares rose about 2% after company reported earnings. While Coinbase beat on revenue, second quarter adjusted EBITDA of $596 million came in lower than consensus of $607.7 million. Total revenue was down 11% quarter-over-quarter with net income dropping significantly from $1.2 billion in previous quarter to only $36 million. Coinbase's transaction fees slipped 27% from previous quarter as trading volume fell 28%. However, subscription and services revenue grew 17% from previous quarter, demonstrating company's diversification efforts. Balance sheet remained strong with $7.8 billion in USD resources at end of Q2, up $733 million quarter-over-quarter.
